description: Lower fragment: Bottom part of a legal document, in Arabic script. Deed of sale. The seller is Dāʾūd and his son is also involved. Two witness clauses are preserved. The date is difficult to read; in the body of the document it appears to read 732 and in the witness clause it appears to read 735. The month is Muḥarram.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בNLI.
